case_title: ANDREW JAMES WHITE VS. HEALTH RIGHT 360

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, ANDREW JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HEALTH RIGHT 360 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
